perks.summary: deploy an NVIDIA VSS compose profile (probe creds, resolve + normalize compose, docker compose up -d) — destructive
read-only credential gate: validate NGC / NVIDIA_API_KEY / HF_TOKEN against their services before a deploy
probe an OpenAI-compatible remote LLM/VLM endpoint (BASE_URL/v1/models) and verify the selected model id is advertised
strip dangling optional depends_on entries from a resolved.yml so docker compose up -d does not abort
